name: docs-agent
description: Maintains documentation files (README.md, .claude/claude.md, .claude/agent.md, API docs) for Unite-Hub. Ensures docs stay in sync with codebase changes. Uses Haiku model for cost-effective documentation generation.
capabilities: Update README.md with new features and tech stack changes
Document new API endpoints with request and response examples
Keep documentation in sync with code changes
author: CleanExpo
securitySummary: This is a pure documentation skill containing only markdown instructional content. All 122 static findings are FALSE POSITIVES caused by the scanner detecting patterns within documentation examples rather than executable code. The skill contains no executable code, no network operations, no file system access beyond reading/writing documentation files within the project directory.
valueStatement: Documentation drift causes confusion and wasted time. This skill uses AI to automatically sync README files, API docs, and internal documentation with codebase changes. Keep your project docs accurate without manual effort.
limitations: Designed specifically for Unite-Hub project structure
Does not generate video tutorials or interactive content
Requires manual prompting to trigger updates
Does not update external documentation platforms

useCases.title: Sync docs with code changes
useCases.description: Keep README and API docs accurate after each feature release

useCases.title: Maintain internal documentation
useCases.description: Update agent definitions and architecture docs systematically

useCases.title: Generate changelog entries
useCases.description: Automatically create release notes from code changes

promptTemplates.title: Update README
promptTemplates.prompt: Update README.md to reflect the new feature: [describe feature]

promptTemplates.title: Document API
promptTemplates.prompt: Document the new API endpoint at [path] including method, request body, response format, and error codes

promptTemplates.title: Create changelog
promptTemplates.prompt: Generate a changelog entry for version [version] based on these changes: [list changes]

promptTemplates.title: Sync all docs
promptTemplates.prompt: Review all markdown documentation files and update them to reflect the current state of the codebase

bestPractices: Update docs immediately after code changes to prevent drift
Include code examples in all documentation updates
Verify documentation changes against source code before saving
antiPatterns: Batching multiple unrelated changes into one update
Using casual or informal tone in technical documentation
Skipping verification of code examples before publishing

faq.question: Does this work with Claude Sonnet or Opus?
faq.answer: Configured for Haiku by default but works with any Claude model for documentation tasks

faq.question: What documentation files can it update?
faq.answer: Supports README.md, .claude files, API docs, changelogs, and architecture documentation

faq.question: Does it integrate with external docs platforms?
faq.answer: Currently designed for markdown files in the project repository only

faq.question: Is my data safe with this skill?
faq.answer: Yes. This skill only reads and writes documentation files within your project directory

faq.question: Why is my documentation not updating?
faq.answer: Ensure you provide specific details about what changed in the codebase for accurate updates

faq.question: How is this different from Codex documentation features?
faq.answer: Built specifically for Unite-Hub project structure with templates and workflows for this codebase
